IT Bench Sales Specialist

🚀 We’re Hiring: AI & ML Engineer!

Visa: USC only

Job Title: AI/ML Engineer
Location: Remote
 Employment Type: Contract
Job Summary:
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer with strong hands-on experience in building and deploying AI-driven solutions. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing, training, and optimizing machine learning models, as well as designing scalable AI solutions to solve complex business problems. This role requires deep technical expertise in AI/ML development, data processing, and model deployment in production environments.

Key Responsibilities:
Design, develop, and deploy end-to-end AI/ML solutions to address business requirements.
Build, train, and optimize machine learning and deep learning models using structured and unstructured data.
Develop and implement scalable AI pipelines for data ingestion, preprocessing, model training, and inference.
Work on real-time and batch processing systems for AI-driven applications.
Integrate AI/ML models into production systems using APIs and microservices architecture.
Perform model evaluation, tuning, and validation to ensure high accuracy and performance.
Collaborate with data engineers, software developers, and business stakeholders to deliver AI-based solutions.
Implement MLOps best practices for model versioning, monitoring, and lifecycle management.
Optimize model performance and scalability in cloud environments.
Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI/ML technologies and frameworks.


Qualifications:
Experience with LLMs, Generative AI, or NLP-based applications.
Knowledge of vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, FAISS).
Experience in real-time AI applications and streaming data (Kafka is a plus).
Familiarity with model explainability and ethical AI practices.


If Interested candidates can share their resume at : Harsha@Gforgetech.com
